title: veronica verna var. pusilla
intro: Veronica verna var. pusilla, also known as Dwarf Blue Veronica, is a small, perennial flowering plant belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Veronica verna var. pusilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
